Design System v0.8.0
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Data Display

Avatar-Stack Component

Überlappende Avatar-Reihe — Team-Member, Teilnehmer-Liste, "X andere". Layout-Wrapper auf existierender .avatar-Component, kein eigenes Visual-Identity-Token-Set.

Beispiele

AM MS LV +3
HTML anzeigen 
<div class="avatar-stack" role="group" aria-label="Team">
  <span class="avatar avatar--c3" title="Anna Meier">AM</span>
  <span class="avatar avatar--c1" title="Marc Stein">MS</span>
  <span class="avatar avatar--c4" title="Lisa Vogel">LV</span>
  <span class="avatar avatar--more" title="+3 weitere">+3</span>
</div>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--avatar-size Optional steuert alle Kinder (erbt durch Cascade)
--avatar-stack-overlap Optional negative Margin zwischen Avataren (default -0.625rem)
--avatar-stack-ring Optional —
--color-bg Optional —
--avatar-stack-ring-width Optional Ring-Dicke (default 2px)

Modifier

  • .avatar-stack--sm — / --lg Größen-Presets (steuern Kinder)
  • .avatar-stack--hoverable — fan-out-Animation auf Hover
Source-CSS ansehen
